initialRegression.cause: SENTINEL_POLL_SECONDS was absent from the Sentinel child environment allowlist
initialRegression.behavior: Sentinel rejected NaN during strict environment parsing; the parent detected child exit and drained Observer and PAYDAY
initialRegression.fix: Added SENTINEL_POLL_SECONDS to SENTINEL_ENV_KEYS and added a regression assertion

finalRun.shutdownTrigger: synthetic SIGTERM event in the parent process
